subject: Swift-BAT triggers 1216751 and 1216753 are not astrophysical events
submitter: Simone Dichiara at Pennsylvania State University <sbd5667@psu.edu>
body:
S. Dichiara (PSU) report on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift Observatory Team:

Swift-BAT triggers 1216751 and 1216753 are also related to the ongoing star tracker loss-of-lock event, and and they not of astrophysical interest.
